Online Baking Classes

Learn to Bake Beautiful Cakes & Pastries — From Home

Welcome to Stine Cakes and Pastries Academy. Join warm, hands-on online baking classes and turn simple ingredients into cakes, pastries, and treats you'll be proud of. Beginners are always welcome.

Why Bake With Us

Friendly Support, Every Step of the Way

Whether you're baking for your family, starting a small business, or simply following a passion, our online classes guide you step by step. Learn at your own pace from the comfort of your kitchen.

🌏

Fully Online

Learn from anywhere, no travel needed. Bake along right from your own kitchen.

🥧

Beginner Friendly

Clear, step-by-step lessons for every level. No experience required.

📱

Flexible Payment

Pay conveniently in installments via M-Pesa. Your first installment secures your seat.

<\!-- ABOUT -->
Meet Your Instructor

Hello, I'm Christine

I'm the baker and teacher behind Stine Cakes and Pastries Academy. Baking has always been my passion, and there is nothing I enjoy more than helping others discover the joy of creating something delicious with their own hands.

Through my online classes, I share the skills, recipes, and little secrets that make baking both fun and rewarding. My goal is simple: to help you bake with confidence, whatever your starting point.

I'd love to welcome you into our baking community.

— Christine

What You'll Learn

What Your Course Covers

One complete online course takes you through everything below — from your very first bake to beautiful celebration cakes.

Cake Baking Basics

Beginners · Online · 4 weeks, 2 sessions/week
  • Master moist, fluffy cakes from scratch
  • Understand ingredients & measuring
  • Get perfect bakes every time

Frosting & Decoration

Beginner / Intermediate · Online
  • Smooth buttercream & piping techniques
  • Finishing touches that wow
  • Colour, texture & design basics
Part of the full courseJoin →

Pastry Essentials

Beginners · Online
  • Puff pastry, scones & sweet treats
  • Cookies that stay soft and tasty
  • Simple techniques, beautiful results
Part of the full courseJoin →

Celebration Cakes

Intermediate · Online
  • Birthday & special-occasion cakes start to finish

<\!-- HOW IT WORKS -->
Simple & Stress-Free

How It Works

Joining a class takes just a few minutes. Here's how it all comes together.

1

Choose Your Class

Browse the classes above and pick the one that's right for you.

2

Register

Fill in the short form. We'll confirm your spot by email or WhatsApp.

3

Pay via M-Pesa

Pay in 2 or 3 easy installments. Your first installment secures your seat.

4

Start Baking\!

Join your online sessions and bake along with friendly guidance.

M-Pesa Payment: Pay in 2–3 installments via M-Pesa Pochi la Biashara to 0715 274 526. Installment 1 secures your seat; installments 2 & 3 are due before the agreed dates. Once we confirm your first installment, you'll receive your class link and welcome pack.
